nodes.title: Meridian Health - HIPAA-Compliant Cloud Migration

body.processed:
Meridian Health, a regional healthcare provider with 12 clinics and 800 employees, needed to modernize their aging on-premises infrastructure while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance.

The Challenge

Meridian was running critical applications on end-of-life servers with no redundancy. Staff frequently experienced downtime, and the IT team was overwhelmed with reactive break-fix work.

Our Solution

  • Migrated 15 servers to Azure with HIPAA-compliant configuration
  • Deployed Microsoft 365 with Intune device management
  • Implemented EDR and SIEM for continuous security monitoring
  • Established disaster recovery with 1-hour RTO

Results

Within six months, Meridian reduced unplanned downtime by 94%, achieved full HIPAA compliance, and reduced IT costs by 30% compared to maintaining on-premises hardware.
body.summary: Meridian Health, a regional healthcare provider with 12 clinics and 800 employees, needed to modernize their aging on-premises infrastructure while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance.The ChallengeMer

nodes.resultsSummary: 94% reduction in downtime, HIPAA compliance achieved, 30% cost savings

nodes.title: Sterling Law Group - Zero Trust Security Transformation

body.processed:
Sterling Law Group, a mid-size law firm handling sensitive litigation, experienced a phishing attack that compromised two employee accounts. They needed an immediate security overhaul.

The Challenge

The firm had minimal security infrastructure -- basic antivirus, no MFA, and employees using personal devices to access client files. Attorney-client privilege demanded the highest level of data protection.

Our Solution

  • Deployed zero trust network architecture
  • Implemented MFA across all applications and VPN access
  • Enrolled all devices in endpoint management with encryption
  • Conducted quarterly security awareness training

Results

In the 18 months since implementation, Sterling has experienced zero security incidents. They passed their first SOC 2 Type II audit and now use their security posture as a competitive differentiator when pitching to clients.
body.summary: Sterling Law Group, a mid-size law firm handling sensitive litigation, experienced a phishing attack that compromised two employee accounts. They needed an immediate security overhaul.The ChallengeThe

nodes.resultsSummary: Zero security incidents in 18 months, SOC 2 Type II certified

image.alt: Modern law office with secure workstations

nodes.title: Apex Manufacturing - IT Consolidation & Cost Reduction

body.processed:
Apex Manufacturing, with 3 production facilities and 500 employees, was managing IT through a patchwork of local vendors and in-house staff with inconsistent results and rising costs.

The Challenge

Each facility had its own network design, different endpoint management tools, and no centralized monitoring. IT spend was growing 20% year-over-year with no improvement in service quality.

Our Solution

  • Consolidated all locations under a single managed services agreement
  • Standardized networking equipment and configuration
  • Deployed centralized monitoring and ticketing
  • Implemented SD-WAN for reliable inter-site connectivity

Results

Apex reduced annual IT spending by $180,000, improved network uptime to 99.98%, and freed their internal IT staff to focus on manufacturing-specific technology projects.
body.summary: Apex Manufacturing, with 3 production facilities and 500 employees, was managing IT through a patchwork of local vendors and in-house staff with inconsistent results and rising costs.The ChallengeEach

image.alt: Modern manufacturing facility with technology integration
